zh.Todenham, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托登哈姆
zh.Gressenhall, Norfolk, England: 英國英格蘭諾福爾可格雷哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John DeBohun I於1301年1月6日出生在英國素可易亞布恩時，他的父親James de Bohun19歲，母親Joan de Braose19歲。他於1326年與Isabel de Tregoz在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾托登哈姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年12月5日在英國素可米度爾斯特享年66歲。

zh-hans.Todenham, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托登哈姆
zh-hans.Gressenhall, Norfolk, England: 英国英格兰諾福爾可格雷哈爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John DeBohun I于1301年1月6日出生在英国素可易亞布恩时，他的父亲James de Bohun19岁，母亲Joan de Braose19岁。他于1326年与Isabel de Tregoz在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾托登哈姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年12月5日在英国素可米度爾斯特享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John DeBohun I was born on 6 January 1301, in Easebourne, Sussex, England, his father, James de Bohun, was 19 and his mother, Joan de Braose, was 19. He married Isabel de Tregoz in 1326, in Todenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 5 December 1367, in Midhurst, Sussex, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John DeBohun I est né le 6 janvier 1301, à Easebourne, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, James de Bohun, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Joan de Braose, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Isabel de Tregoz en 1326, à Todenham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 5 décembre 1367, à Midhurst, Sussex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John DeBohun I am 6. Januar 1301 in Easebourne, Sussex, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James de Bohun 19 und seine Mutter Joan de Braose 19. Er hat 1326 in Todenham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Isabel de Tregoz geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 5. Dezember 1367 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Midhurst, Sussex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John DeBohun I è nato il il 6 gennaio 1301 nel Easebourne, Sussex, England, il suo padre, James de Bohun, aveva 19 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Braose, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Isabel de Tregoz nel 1326, nel Todenham, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 dicembre 1367, nel Midhurst, Sussex, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John DeBohun Iが1301年1月6日にイギリススセックスエアセボウルンで生まれた時，父James de Bohunは19歳，母Joan de Braoseは19歳であった。1326年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアトデンハムでIsabel de Tregozと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年12月5日にイギリススセックスミドハルストで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John DeBohun I(이)가 1301년 1월 6일 영국 수세스 이세보우른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James de Bohun(은)는 19세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Braose(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1326년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토데함에서 Isabel de Tregoz(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 12월 5일 영국 수세스 미드후르스트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.6 January 1301–5 December 1367: 6 de janeiro de 1301–5 de dezembro de 1367
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John DeBohun I nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1301, em Easebourne, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de Bohun, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Braose, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Tregoz em 1326, em Todenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de dezembro de 1367, em Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John DeBohun I родился 6 января 1301 г. в местности эеисебурн, суссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени James de Bohun было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Braose, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Tregoz в 1326 г. в местности тоденам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 5 декабря 1367 г. в местности мидхурст, суссекс, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.6 January 1301–5 December 1367: 6 de enero de 1301–5 de diciembre de 1367
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John DeBohun I nació el 6 de enero de 1301, en Easebourne, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, James de Bohun, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Joan de Braose, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Isabel de Tregoz en 1326, en Todenham, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de diciembre de 1367, en Midhurst, Sussex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
